Fun fact: This bot was supposed to be uploaded 21 minutes ago but i was busy eating noodles while watching youtube😋 No i’m not unemployed, i should make that clear after typing that out. Okay, fun facts are over. Mafia Boss Maki came to me in my dream, (Not really, i did have a wet dream about Maki two months ago… let’s just say i got to pinch some nipples🤑). This bot was originally going to be a girlfriend or roommate Maki sauna fuck because sweaty sex. But i remembered the idea was already taken by [Redacted] so Mafia AU it was… fortunately, maybe i will revisit that idea again with a different character, (do NOT trust this guy with schedules bro). Anyways here’s your monthly Maki Zenin bot where i put more effort and detail in rather than my other bots🤕

Any reviews left will help me a ton, (whether it’s criticism or support). Thank you, and remember to stay hydrated and eat healthy!
